idea-plugin.name: AIF Handoff
idea-plugin.description:
AIF Handoff — Autonomous Task Management for AI Agents

AIF Handoff brings an embedded Kanban board directly into your JetBrains IDE, providing a seamless interface for managing tasks handled by autonomous AI agents. The plugin automatically launches a local dev server and renders the full Kanban UI in a dedicated tool window — no need to switch between your IDE and a browser.

Key Features

  • One-click setup: automatically clones the repository, installs dependencies, and starts the server
  • Built-in Kanban board with drag-and-drop task management
  • Integrated settings editor for environment variables (.env)
  • Auto-update from the upstream repository
  • Works with IntelliJ IDEA, PhpStorm, WebStorm, PyCharm, and other JetBrains IDEs
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0

  • Initial release
  • Embedded Kanban board with JCEF browser
  • One-click server setup and management
  • Environment variables editor
  • Auto-restart on settings change
